description: Toggle whether a user is a warehouse user in the DB.
robot_keyword: Make user a warehouse user/ not a warehouse user:
migration_note: DB fixture. Gherkin-prefixed variant; same canonical.

description: Suite/test setup for API tests.

description: Suite/test setup for UI tests.

description: Share a shopping cart with another user.

robot_keyword: Yves: signup guest user during checkout:

description: Skip the test when DMS on/off tags do not match the run mode.

description: Captured raw SQL SELECT fragment, not a keyword.
robot_keyword: select registration_key from spy_customer where customer_reference = '${user_reference_id}'
migration_note: EXTRACTOR NOISE: SQL argument to a DB-query keyword.

description: Begin creating a new abstract product.
robot_keyword: Zed: start new abstract product creation:
migration_note: Visit the abstract product create page.

description: Begin creating a Data Exchange API configuration for a DB table.

description: Submit a new request for quote.

description: Switch to the named tab.

description: Unsubscribe from availability notifications.
